## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Process update
- [ ] Governance or policy update
- [ ] Tooling update

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run format:check`

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and reviewable
- [ ] Related docs were updated
- [ ] Trade-offs or alternatives are documented
